nasb.text: Therefore all who devour you will be devoured; And all your adversaries, every one of them, will go into captivity; And those who plunder you will be for plunder, And all who prey upon you I will give for prey.

esv.text: Therefore all who devour you shall be devoured, and all your foes, every one of them, shall go into captivity; those who plunder you shall be plundered, and all who prey on you I will make a prey.

cnv.text: 但是，吞吃你的，必被吞吃； 你所有的敵人全都要被擄走； 搶掠你的，必成為被搶掠之物； 掠奪你的，我必使他們成為被掠奪之物。

ccb.text: 然而，毁灭你们的必被毁灭， 与你们为敌的必被掳走， 掳掠你们的必被掳掠， 抢夺你们的必被抢夺。
